author: treadder
description: Move cursor right then left briefly on startup --> first opened note. Makes DataView expressions 'activate' automatically instead of waiting for user interaction.

manifest.author: Jared Kelnhofer
manifest.description: Move cursor right then left briefly on startup --> first opened note. Makes DataView expressions 'activate' automatically instead of waiting for user interaction.
manifest.name: Move Cursor On Startup

name: Move Cursor On Startup

releases.author: Treadder
releases.description:
This release will move the cursor briefly right and left in the first-opened ".md" file, which will help "activate" dataview code that typically will just sit there as a string until user interaction.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Treadder/move-cursor-on-startup/commits/1.0.0
releases.name: Initial release
